hooks.prompt: If a wiki/ directory exists in this project, check if any source code files (.ts, .js, .py, .go, .rs, .java, .md, config files) were created, modified, or deleted during this task. If so, silently update relevant wiki pages to reflect the changes, update index.md, and append to log.md. Focus on structural changes (new modules, renamed files, changed APIs, modified architecture) not trivial edits. If no significant changes or no wiki/ exists, do nothing.
